items.name: ♡ Boots
items.description:
Don’t forget to like and show your support! 💕

Turn every step into a statement with the Velora Lace-Up Boots. Designed with a bold yet feminine edge, these boots add confidence, charm, and effortless style to any outfit. Perfect for dressing up or leveling up your everyday look. ✨

items.name: ❤️Build-a-Gojo : Shinjuku Lines (Yuta Gojo Head)
items.description:
MUST READ! This item is apart of a set that you can mix and match to make your own customizable Satoru Gojo! 

There are 3 outfits so far (more to come):

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=%F0%9F%91%95&Category=1&CreatorName=Realistic+Anime+Avatars&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

There are 4 hairs to use this "Yuta Gojo" head with, along with 3 hair outlines to achieve the anime lineart style:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=%E2%9D%A4%EF%B8%8F&Category=1&CreatorName=Realistic+Anime+Avatars&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

Head: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/390982/Living-Phone

Arms: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/47635/Strong-Body-Dynamic
